% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for new_vessel_press_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for new_vessel_press_pos.tptp
1. publishes(new_vessel_press,neapolitan_chronicles) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0,X1] : (publishes(X0,X1) => in_english(X1)) [input(axiom)]
5. in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [flattening 6]
9. ! [X0,X1] : (in_english(X1) | ~publishes(X0,X1)) [ennf transformation 2]
10. publishes(new_vessel_press,neapolitan_chronicles) [cnf transformation 1]
11. ~publishes(X0,X1) | in_english(X1) [cnf transformation 9]
13. ~in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [cnf transformation 7]
14. in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [resolution 11,10]
16. $false [forward subsumption resolution 14,13]
% SZS output end Proof for new_vessel_press_pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
